content: Real PTQ results on LLaMA-2 7B (Wikitext2 PPL, FP16 baseline ~5.12): GPTQ INT4 128g ~5.85 (4.15 bpw, ~3.6GB); AWQ INT4 ~5.6-5.8; SpQR INT4 (mixed precision, outliers in FP16) ~5.29; QuIP# INT4 ~4.75 (5.89 bpw worse); AQLM INT2 ~6.59 (2.02 bpw), INT3 ~5.46 (3.04 bpw) - Pareto-optimal at ~2.5 bpw; HQQ is fast calibration-free CPU INT2/INT4. Key insight: GPTQ/AWQ INT4 at 4.15 bpw achieves ~3.4-4x compression vs FP16 with <0.1 perplexity loss on Wiki2. Group quantization matters more than algorithm name.
